articles.title: Novelis to host Q4 and full fiscal year 2026 earnings conference call on May 19
articles.summary: Novelis will report Q4 and full FY2026 financial results on 19 May 2026, with CEO Steve Fisher and CFO Dev Ahuja hosting a conference call for analysts and investors.

articles.title: Canmakers say capacity is tight as they gear up for big summer
articles.summary: Crown CEO Tim Donahue stated March 2026 was Crown's highest-ever monthly shipments month and warned of a very tight can supply situation this summer; Ball and Crown are managing elevated aluminium input costs ahead of World Cup and America250 demand spikes.

articles.title: Aluminium recyclers warn of EU ETS hit
articles.summary: European aluminium recyclers warned that the EU ETS benchmark update for 2026–2030 cuts free carbon allowances by ~34% vs. 2021–2025 levels, significantly raising production costs for recyclers who cannot pass prices through in internationally-set aluminium markets.
articles.novelis_angle: Novelis’s European recycling operations (Nachterstedt, Latchford) face the same ETS cost headwind, though its premium closed-loop and low-carbon product portfolio may command green premiums unavailable to commodity recyclers.
